title: Trochocephalus austroaltaicus

taxonomy: Trochocephalus austroaltaicus is a species of liverwort, which is a type of non-vascular land plant. It belongs to the family Lejeuneaceae, a large family of liverworts commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The classification of Trochocephalus austroaltaicus can be summarized as follows: kingdom Plantae, division Marchantiophyta, class Jungermanniopsida, order Jungermanniales, and family Lejeuneaceae. Liverworts like Trochocephalus austroaltaicus are often found growing on rocks, trees, and other surfaces. They are small, non-vascular plants that play an important role in their ecosystems.
